description: Create a GitHub Actions release workflow that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have three jobs: build_deb, build-appimage, and build-windows-packages. The build_deb job builds .deb files for debian-based systems (Ubuntu 24.04, 22.04, and 20.04) with QT5 or QT6 dependencies. The build-appimage job builds a universal and portable AppImage package on ubuntu-20.04. The build-windows-packages job creates Windows packages on a windows-2022 runner.
